label: 📸 Photos
expected_behavior: Routes to the Photos view (goTo('photos')) which mounts tpl-view-photos / the Photo Library.
notes: Primary entry point into the d6-photos surface.

label: 📸 Photos
expected_behavior: From the tools/quick-nav menu, navigates to the Photos view (goTo('photos')) and closes the menu.
notes: Secondary nav into photos surface.

label: 📸 Damage Photos
expected_behavior: mobileNav('photos') switches the mobile view to the Photo Library and closes the more-menu.
notes: Mobile nav entry into photos surface.

label: ← Back to CRM
expected_behavior: Routes back to the CRM/leads view (goTo('crm')).
notes: In Photo Library page header.

label: 📷 Open Camera
expected_behavior: Calls PhotoEngine.openCamera(window._currentPhotoLeadId) to launch the live camera capture modal; shows 'Photo engine loading…' toast if engine not yet loaded.
notes: PhotoEngine lazy-loads via the 'photos' ScriptLoader bundle.

label: 📄 New Report
expected_behavior: Calls InspectionReportEngine.openBuilder('inspectionBuilderContainer', currentLeadId) to open the multi-step inspection report builder; toast if engine loading.
notes: Opens inspection-report-engine.js builder overlay.

label: By Property
expected_behavior: setPhotoMode('by-property') shows #photoGalleryContainer (per-lead gallery), hides the Recent feed, and marks this tab active/aria-selected.
notes: Default active mode toggle.

label: Recent
expected_behavior: setPhotoMode('recent') hides per-lead gallery, shows #photoRecentFeed and calls renderRecentPhotoFeed() to lay out a cross-lead chronological photo feed grouped by date.
notes: Phase D.2 cross-lead recent feed.

label: Search jobs by name or address...
expected_behavior: On input, filterPhotoLeads(query) stores the lowercased query in window._photoSearchQuery and re-renders renderPhotoLeads() to filter the property/lead list.

label: Select a property... (dropdown)
expected_behavior: nbdSelectPhotoLead(leadId) sets window._currentPhotoLeadId and calls PhotoEngine.openGallery('photoGalleryContainer', leadId) to render that lead's photo gallery.
notes: Options populated dynamically with leads/properties.

label: Only with photos
expected_behavior: nbdTogglePhotosOnly(checked) sets window._photosOnlyWithPhotos and re-renders renderPhotoLeads() to show only leads that already have photos.
notes: data-on-pass=checked passes the checkbox state.

label: 📍 Near Me
expected_behavior: damageNearMePhotos() requests geolocation, shows 'Finding nearby inspections...' toast, routes to the Map view (goTo('map')) and centers the map on the user's GPS at zoom 14; 'Location access denied' toast on failure.
notes: Navigates away from photos to map.

label: Camera shutter FAB (📷)
expected_behavior: openPhotoEngineOrClickProxy('mCreatePhotoInput') opens PhotoEngine.openCamera() if loaded, else clicks the hidden #mCreatePhotoInput file input as fallback.
reveal_state: always (CSS shows only on mobile + when view-photos active)
notes: Wave 2C.2 CompanyCam-style FAB; mobile-only via CSS selector #view-photos.active.

label: 📷 Click to upload damage photos (drop zone)
expected_behavior: clickProxy forwards the click to the hidden #photoUploadInput file chooser, opening the OS file/camera picker.
notes: Legacy per-lead Damage Photos modal upload zone.

label: Damage photos file input (multiple)
expected_behavior: On file selection, uploadPhotos(input) (dashboard-widgets.js:498) uploads the chosen image(s) to Storage/Firestore for the current lead and refreshes #photoGridModal.
notes: accept=image/*,.heic,.heif,.avif; multiple; data-on-pass=element.

label: ✕ (close)
expected_behavior: closeModal('photoModal') closes the Damage Photos viewer modal.
notes: Two close affordances: corner X (11979) and modal-bar X (11986); representative one recorded.

label: (hidden) mobile create photo input
expected_behavior: _mCreatePhotoPicked(event) takes the picked file and calls PhotoEngine.uploadOne(file, {source:'mobile-create-popover'}) with 'Photo uploaded' toast; if engine absent, queues to window._pendingPhotoUploads with 'Photo queued' toast. Resets input value.
notes: capture=environment; single file. Fired by shutter FAB fallback and _mCreate('photo').

label: Photo (create row)
expected_behavior: _mCreate('photo') closes the create popover and clicks the hidden #mCreatePhotoInput, launching the device camera/photo picker.
notes: Mobile global '+' create flow photo entry.

label: 📸 Photos
expected_behavior: openPhotosForLead() stashes the current lead and navigates to /pro/customer.html?id=<leadId>#photos (the customer page Photos tab).
notes: Leaves dashboard for customer.html photos tab (separate page).

label: 📸 Photos
expected_behavior: cdaPhotos() closes the card-detail modal and calls PhotoEngine.openCamera(window._cardDetailLeadId) to capture photos for that lead; toast if engine loading.
notes: Second per-card Photos affordance opening the camera directly.

label: Photos (circular action)
expected_behavior: cdaMjdAct('photos') invokes _mJdAct('photos', currentLeadId) which opens the photos flow for the lead in the mobile job-detail surface.
notes: One of 5 circular act buttons in mobile job detail.

label: Photos (tab)
expected_behavior: _mJdSwitchTab('photos') switches the mobile job-detail tab body to #mJdTabPhotos (the per-lead photo strip).
notes: JobNimbus-style 3-tab job detail (Activity/Photos/Details).

label: 📥 Export Photos (ZIP)
expected_behavior: _exportPhotos() queries all photos where userId==uid and downloads a CSV manifest (id, leadId, url, thumbUrl, description, tags, quality, fileSize, uploadedAt); 'Sign in first'/'Export failed' toasts on error.
notes: Label says ZIP but implementation exports a CSV manifest — note discrepancy for QA.

label: ← (close camera)
expected_behavior: Stops all camera MediaStream tracks and removes the camera modal from the DOM.
notes: Modal injected by PhotoEngine.openCamera (not in dashboard.html static markup).

label: Quality preset badge (e.g. HIGH)
expected_behavior: Cycles the capture quality preset (state.currentPreset) and updates the badge label.

label: Flash (torch)
expected_behavior: Toggles the camera torch via the video track constraints; disabled/dimmed when the device has no torch capability (Safari/ImageCapture unsupported).
notes: Capability-gated; opacity 0.3 + disabled when no torch.

label: Switch Camera
expected_behavior: Toggles facingMode between environment/user, stops the old stream and starts getUserMedia with the new facing mode.

label: Capture (shutter)
expected_behavior: Captures a frame from the video stream, flashes the overlay, increments the session photo counter, and opens the Review & Tag preview modal for the new shot.
notes: Core capture action.

label: ← (back / discard preview)
expected_behavior: peRemove removes #photo-preview-modal from the DOM (discards the previewed capture without saving).

label: Location tag pill (repeats per QUICK_LOCATIONS)
expected_behavior: peTagToggle toggles the 'selected' class on the clicked pill; selected pills become the photo's location tags on Save & Next.
notes: Repeats per QUICK_LOCATIONS entry; one representative recorded.

label: Damage type tag pill (repeats per QUICK_DAMAGE)
expected_behavior: peTagToggle toggles the 'selected' class on the clicked damage pill; selected pills become damage tags on save.
notes: Repeats per QUICK_DAMAGE entry; one representative recorded.

label: Photo type tag pill (Before/During/After/Close-Up/Overview/Measurement)
expected_behavior: peTagToggle toggles 'selected'; the chosen type tag (before/during/after) drives the gallery phase bucket (Before/During/After) on save.
notes: These are the Before/During/After phase selectors per the surface brief; repeats per QUICK_TYPE.

label: Notes (textarea)
expected_behavior: Optional free-text notes saved as the photo's description field on Save & Next.

label: Retake
expected_behavior: peRemove discards the preview modal (#photo-preview-modal) so the user can recapture.

label: Save & Next
expected_behavior: Uploads the captured photo with its selected tags/notes to Storage+Firestore, derives the Before/During/After phase from tags, refreshes the gallery cache, and kicks off AI auto-classification.
notes: Core save/persist action; bound by id onclick (not data-action).

label: All Photos / tag filter (select)
expected_behavior: onchange calls PhotoEngine._filterGallery(leadId) to filter the gallery grid by the selected tag/category (options built from TAG_CATEGORIES).
notes: This is the Before/During/After/Annotated/category filter dropdown for the gallery.

label: Sort by (Newest/Oldest/Quality)
expected_behavior: onchange calls PhotoEngine._sortGallery(leadId) to reorder the gallery grid by newest, oldest, or quality preset.

label: Grid View / List View
expected_behavior: Selects gallery layout mode (grid vs list).
notes: No onchange handler wired in source — verify view-mode actually re-renders during testing.

label: ✨ Analyze All with AI
expected_behavior: peBulkAnalyze → PhotoEngine._bulkAnalyze(leadId) runs AI damage classification across all photos in the lead's gallery and renders a summary into #pe-ai-summary.
notes: AI-classify trigger; calls Cloud Function analyzeRoofPhoto.

label: Photo thumbnail (repeats per photo)
expected_behavior: peOpenLightbox → PhotoEngine._openLightbox(photoId, leadId) opens the full-size lightbox with metadata (date, notes, location, quality, size, tags) plus Stage/Delete/AI actions.
notes: Repeats per photo; one representative recorded.

label: Photo select checkbox (repeats per photo)
expected_behavior: Selects the photo for multi-select operations (the Select bucket); checkbox state read by bulk/staging flows.
notes: This is the 'Select' affordance from the surface brief; repeats per photo. No explicit change handler — verify selection wiring during testing.

label: Stage for Report
expected_behavior: peStagePhoto → PhotoEngine._stagePhoto(photoId, leadId) adds the photo to state.stagedPhotos[leadId] so it is included in the generated photo/inspection report; shows an OK staged badge in the grid.

label: Delete
expected_behavior: peDeletePhoto → PhotoEngine._deletePhoto(photoId) confirms then deletePhotoFromFirebase deletes the Firestore doc + Storage blob and shows 'Photo deleted'.
notes: DESTRUCTIVE: drive only to the confirm boundary. Deletes doc + Storage object.

label: Analyze with AI
expected_behavior: PhotoAI.injectInLightbox button triggers AI damage analysis for the single photo (analyzeRoofPhoto Cloud Function) and renders the resulting damageType/confidence in the lightbox slot.
notes: Single-photo AI classify; only present when PhotoAI is loaded and no analysis exists yet.

label: X / OK (close lightbox)
expected_behavior: peRemove removes #photo-lightbox from the DOM (closes the lightbox). Both X and OK buttons do the same.
notes: Two identical close buttons (X at 1466, OK at 1467); one representative recorded.

label: ← Previous
expected_behavior: Moves the inspection report builder to the previous step; hidden on step 0.
notes: Renders into #inspectionBuilderContainer / inline container in the photos view.

label: Next → / Generate Report
expected_behavior: Advances builder steps; on the final step (4) the label becomes 'Generate Report' and it produces the inspection report PDF from the staged photos and field data.
notes: Final step generates/produces a report document — treat the generate boundary with care.

label: Open (saved report)
expected_behavior: Opens a previously saved inspection report by its data-report-id.
notes: Repeats per saved report; one representative recorded.

label: Delete (saved report)
expected_behavior: Deletes a saved inspection report by its data-report-id.
notes: DESTRUCTIVE: drive only to confirm boundary. Repeats per saved report.

label: + Add Item
expected_behavior: Adds a new line item / finding row to the current inspection report builder step.

label: × (remove item)
expected_behavior: Removes the associated inspection report line item / finding row.
notes: Repeats per item row; one representative recorded.

label: 📸 Photo Report
expected_behavior: generatePhotoReport(leadId) (photo-report.js:38) builds a visual project document with before/after photo grids for the lead; a lazy stub load-then-runs it once the photos bundle is loaded.
notes: Generates a photo report document. Chip lives in Next Actions / report surfaces; confirm exact trigger element during live test.

label: Share Gallery
expected_behavior: ShareGallery.generate(leadId) builds a shareable public photo gallery for the lead (share-gallery.js).
notes: share-gallery.js is loaded on dashboard.html but NO data-action/button in dashboard.html invokes ShareGallery.generate — the Share Gallery trigger lives on customer.html / photo-review.html. Flagged here for completeness; likely NOT reachable from the dashboard surface. Verify during testing.
